title: Savory Juicy Raw-Friendly Tahini Stir-fry
description: A savory and juicy weeknight Mexican (norteno) dish featuring tahini that is both raw-friendly and suitable for those who prefer lighter meals.

ingredients.name: Green chilies, minced
ingredients.notes: For added spice and depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Diced tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Freshly chopped for best flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Lime juice
ingredients.notes: Squeezed from a fresh lime for extra zest and acidity.

instructions: In a medium bowl, mix tahini with olive oil until well combined.
Add minced green chilies, minced garlic, diced tomatoes, and finely chopped red onion to the tahini mixture. Stir well to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
Heat some olive oil in a skillet or wok over medium heat. When hot, pour in the tahini mix.
Stir continuously for about 2-3 minutes until everything is heated through and slightly fragrant. The dish should remain raw-friendly as it does not require high heat to cook.
Remove from heat and stir in cilantro leaves and a squeeze of lime juice just before serving.
Serve immediately with tortilla chips or over rice for added texture and flavor.
